message:
[LOW] fcp-raptorq: add random-loss + duplicate-symbol metamorphic relations

MR3 already covers prefix-drop loss recovery. MR4 generalizes to random
hole patterns across five loss rates (0/10/25/50/75%) and three payload
sizes (sub-symbol, symbol-aligned, multi-symbol). Seed is deterministic
per (payload_size, loss_bps) so any regression reproduces exactly.

MR5 pins the duplicate-vs-conflicting distinction landed in 9ce1cacc:
feeding each symbol twice must decode to the same payload as feeding
each symbol once. A regression that treats a duplicate ESI as a new
contribution — and therefore mutates decoder state — fails MR5.

Severity: LOW — strengthens differential coverage of the decoder. No
production code change.

Verification:
  rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/fcp-review-p2 \
      cargo test -p fcp-raptorq --test metamorphic
  → 5 passed (MR1-MR5), 0 failed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
